meaning: n.举起者,提出者,筹集者,饲养者,酵母
examples: The three-race series will be a curtain-raiser to the Monaco Grand Prix in May.
The company's chief operating officer was the numero-uno fund-raiser for the event.
As a fund-raiser, police officers will don aprons, take orders and bus tables today.
Haggis had met Cruise at a fund-raiser and, a second time, at the Celebrity Centre.
Gloucester's date with Newcastle is the pick of the early ties at Twickenham's traditional season curtain-raiser.
